rules.cssText: .globalNavigation_links__tZquA { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; }
.globalNavigation_experimentNavLinksLeftAlign__y9Vi4 .globalNavigation_dropdown__vn77x { left: 0px; right: auto; width: 826px; margin: 0px; top: calc(100% - var(--dropdown-gap)); }
.globalNavigation_experimentNavLinksLeftAlign__y9Vi4 .globalNavigation_links__tZquA { justify-content: flex-start; padding-inline-start: var(--spacing-16); position: relative; }
.footer_footerTop__rz2e9 { display: grid; grid-auto-columns: max-content; grid-template-rows: repeat(2, max-content); grid-auto-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
.footer_footerTop__rz2e9 { display: flex; justify-content: stretch; align-items: flex-start; width: 25%; }

.homepageLogoWall_stickyWrapper__eeR80 { --local-items-per-row: 6; --local-visible-rows: min(calc(-1 * round(calc(-1 * var(--logo-count, 1) / var(--local-items-per-row) - 0.5), 1)),var(--local-max-rows,3)); --sticky-edge-offset: calc(var(--local-logo-height) - var(--local-visible-rows) * var(--local-row-height) + var(--spacing-4)); }
.HeroCTA_nav__0tsxR { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; width: max-content; max-width: 100%; margin-inline: auto; }

.HeroMedia_productImage__Ojg_0 { width: 100%; max-width: 100%; border: var(--border-width-1) solid var(--color-border-base); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: var(--shadow-level-300); }

.Agent_agentGraphicEnterWrapper__Se_bZ { animation-name: Agent_agentEnter__D6zdB; animation-duration: var(--illustration-enter-duration); animation-fill-mode: forwards; animation-timing-function: var(--illustration-enter-timing-function); }

.Agent_agentMarkEnterWrapper__O6R_r { animation-name: Agent_agentMarkEnter__54wKq; animation-duration: var(--illustration-enter-duration); animation-fill-mode: forwards; animation-timing-function: var(--illustration-enter-timing-function); }

.Agent_agentTaskEnterWrapper__qRPdH { animation-name: Agent_agentTaskEnter__ZpDY1; animation-duration: var(--illustration-enter-duration); animation-fill-mode: forwards; animation-timing-function: var(--illustration-enter-timing-function); }

.Illustrations_leftConveyorGearEnterWrapper__bVCNz, .Illustrations_rightConveyorGearEnterWrapper__uhrrQ { animation-name: Illustrations_rotateEnter__XYlPM; animation-duration: var(--illustration-enter-duration); animation-timing-function: var(--illustration-enter-timing-function); animation-fill-mode: forwards; }

.HomepageHeroAgents_hero__PgXPj { padding-block-start: var(--spacing-56); row-gap: var(--spacing-40); grid-template-columns: minmax(0px, 1fr) minmax(min-content, 960px) minmax(0px, 1fr); grid-template-areas: "left header right" "left media right"; }
.HomepageHeroAgents_hero__PgXPj::after { animation: HomepageHeroAgents_flicker-on__xJ_1J var(--illustration-enter-duration) ease-out both,HomepageHeroAgents_flicker__k9DWp 20s 2s infinite; }

.HomepageHeroAgents_conveyor__d6gQg { animation-name: HomepageHeroAgents_fade-in__HBybG; animation-duration: var(--illustration-enter-duration); animation-fill-mode: forwards; animation-timing-function: var(--illustration-enter-timing-function); }

.HomepageHeroAgents_conveyorLeftContainer__YUZV9::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset-block: 0px; inset-inline-start: 0px; block-size: 100%; inline-size: var(--spacing-32); background: linear-gradient(to left,#0000 0,var(--color-background-base) 75%); }
.HomepageHeroAgents_conveyorRightContainer__8cgX1 { margin-block-start: unset; justify-self: start; translate: calc(var(--spacing-96)*-1) -2%; }

.HomepageHeroAgents_conveyorRightContainer__8cgX1::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset-block: 0px; inset-inline-end: 0px; block-size: 100%; inline-size: var(--spacing-32); background: linear-gradient(to right,#0000 0,var(--color-background-base) 75%); }

.logoWall_logoWallStickyWrapper__IITu4::before { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); content: ""; inline-size: 100vw; inset-block: 0px; inset-inline-start: 50%; position: absolute; transform: translateX(calc(var(--direction) * -50%)); transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1); z-index: -1; }

.logoWall_logoWallStickyWrapper__IITu4::after { --outdent: 36px; border-block-start: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); content: ""; inset: 0 calc(var(--outdent)*-1) auto; position: absolute; transition: border-color 0.2s; mask-image: linear-gradient(to right,#0000,#000 var(--outdent),#000 calc(100% - var(--outdent)),#0000 100%); }

.Marquee_marquee__jTJ0o { animation-duration: ; animation-timing-function: ; animation-delay: ; animation-iteration-count: ; animation-fill-mode: ; animation-name: ; animation-timeline: ; animation-range-start: ; animation-range-end: ; animation-direction: var(--marquee-animation-direction); animation-play-state: var(--marquee-animation-play-state); }

.downloadApps_downloadsContainer__l1wNv { --downloads-container-gap: 32px; --g-grid-gutter: var(--grid-gutter,24px); display: grid; grid-auto-rows: min-content; grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--grid-columns),minmax(1px,1fr)); gap: var(--grid-gutter); width: 100%; align-items: flex-start; container-type: inline-size; }

.MarketoHero_hero__7p9Ig { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0px, 1fr) 420px; align-items: flex-start; gap: 56px; width: min(1200px, 94vw); margin-left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); transform-origin: center center; }

.notionStartupPricingCalculator_variantBlock__3iQUW .notionStartupPricingCalculator_input__vrc0c { display: grid; grid-template-columns: subgrid; column-gap: var(--spacing-24); grid-column: 1 / -1; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; margin-right: calc(var(--input-padding)*-1); }
.notionStartupPricingCalculator_variantBlock__3iQUW .notionStartupPricingCalculator_toolCheckbox__BOEqG { grid-column: span 4; position: relative; left: var(--checkbox-hang-offset); }
.BlockSectionHeader_wrapper__suPEQ { flex-direction: row; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; }
.CareersSection_imageContainer__aTOHT { max-width: unset; min-width: 300px; grid-area: 2 / 2 / auto / 3; justify-self: end; }
.footerCtaSection_illustration__rvRmR { position: absolute; display: block; width: 200px; bottom: -80px; }
.helpCenterContentPreview_gridCondensed__P8K5d { display: grid; justify-content: flex-start; grid-template-columns: 276px minmax(0px, 1fr); gap: 5px 48px; }
.helpCenterContentPreview_gridFull__AooGF { display: grid; justify-content: flex-start; grid-template-columns: 384px 1fr; gap: 5px 48px; }
.BlockAsset_leftCorner__T9e3u { height: calc(100% + var(--spacing-block-m)); width: calc(100% + var(--spacing-block-l)); margin-inline-start: calc(-1*var(--spacing-block-l)); }
.BlockAsset_rightCorner__aUv_3 { height: calc(100% + var(--spacing-block-m)); width: calc(100% + var(--spacing-block-l)); }
.TemplateGalleryHero_ctaContainer__T_BFO { width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 12px; }

.Marquee_marquee__jTJ0o { animation-duration: ; animation-timing-function: ; animation-delay: ; animation-iteration-count: ; animation-fill-mode: ; animation-name: ; animation-timeline: ; animation-range-start: ; animation-range-end: ; animation-direction: var(--marquee-animation-direction); animation-play-state: var(--marquee-animation-play-state); }
